name: Spiced Mule
title: Spiced Mule Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Mule | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A zesty rum mule made with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer, and Angostura bitters.
marketing_description: Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum with ginger beer and a dash of bitters for a zesty take on the rum mule. It's a mule with a bit more kick.

steps: Fill a mule glass with ice.
Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer and the bitters into a glass.
Stir and pour into the mule glass.

raw_text_excerpt: Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum with ginger beer and a dash of bitters for a zesty take on the rum mule. It's a mule with a bit more kick. Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml ginger beer 2 dashes Angostura® bitters 1 lime slice ... 1 Chill Fill a mule glass with ice. 2 Combine Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer and the bitters into a glass. 3 Pour Stir and pour into the mule glass. 4 Garnish Garnish with a lime slice.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Spiced Mule Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
